name: vaulted
title: Vaulted — Secure Secret Sharing
description: Zero-knowledge encrypted, self-destructing secret links from your launcher.
author: maxim_novak

commands.name: create-secret
commands.title: Create Secret
commands.subtitle: Vaulted
commands.description: Encrypt text and get a self-destructing share link. Customize views, expiry, and passphrase.

commands.name: create-from-clipboard
commands.title: Create Secret from Clipboard
commands.subtitle: Vaulted
commands.description: Encrypt the current clipboard contents with your default settings and copy the share link back.

commands.name: view-secret
commands.title: View Secret
commands.subtitle: Vaulted
commands.description: Paste a Vaulted link to decrypt and reveal the secret. Consumes one view.

preferences.name: host
preferences.title: Vaulted host
preferences.description: Base URL of the Vaulted instance. Defaults to https://vaulted.fyi. Use https://... or http://localhost for self-hosted.

preferences.name: defaultViews
preferences.title: Default max views
preferences.description: How many times the secret can be viewed before it's destroyed.

preferences.name: defaultExpiry
preferences.title: Default expiry
preferences.description: How long the secret remains available.

preferences.name: openInBrowser
preferences.title: Open in browser
preferences.label: Open the secret link in the browser after creating it
preferences.description: Useful for visually confirming the link before sending.

preferences.name: confirmConsume
preferences.title: Confirm before consuming a view
preferences.label: Ask before revealing a secret
preferences.description: Viewing a secret consumes a view. Toggle off if you don't want the confirmation prompt.
